import { Observable } from '../Observable'; export var EMPTY = new Observable(function (subscriber) { return subscriber.complete(); }); export function empty(scheduler) { return scheduler ? emptyScheduled(scheduler) : EMPTY; } function emptyScheduled(scheduler) { return new Observable(function (subscriber) { return scheduler.schedule(function () { return subscriber.complete(); }); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=empty.js.map
